docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED APR-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, RICKY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY LEE, KIM LIU, RICKY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, KIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST WIRELESS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $164.50, THE PARTIES TO AGREE UPON TIME AND PLACE FOR RETURN OF REPAIRED CELL PHONE TO PLAINTIFF. CO-DEFENDANT RICKY LIU SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RICKY LIU BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-11-2008 AT 3:30PM.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
